bank_snapshot.name: Number Theory
bank_snapshot.description: All problems about integers and their properties: divisibility, prime numbers, prime factorization, number of divisors, sum of divisors, GCD, LCM, modular arithmetic, congruences, remainders, Euler's

bank_snapshot.name: Algebra
bank_snapshot.description: All problems involving algebraic manipulation and equation solving: linear, quadratic, polynomial, rational, exponential, and logarithmic equations and inequalities; systems of equations; functions, t

bank_snapshot.name: Function Difference Matching
bank_snapshot.description: Problems involving determining a parameter such that the difference between the evaluations of two functions at a specific value satisfies a given condition.

bank_snapshot.name: Volume Conservation Problems
bank_snapshot.description: Problems involving the redistribution of volume from one geometric shape to another with constant density maintained.

bank_snapshot.name: Geometry
bank_snapshot.description: All geometric problems: areas and perimeters of triangles, quadrilaterals, circles, and composite figures; volumes and surface areas of prisms, pyramids, cylinders, cones, and spheres; coordinate geom

bank_snapshot.name: Combinatorics
bank_snapshot.description: All counting problems: permutations (ordered arrangements), combinations (unordered selections), the multiplication principle for independent choices, the addition principle for disjoint cases, inclus

bank_snapshot.name: Nested Recurrence Problems
bank_snapshot.description: Evaluate expressions involving deeply nested operations with a recurring pattern.

bank_snapshot.name: Probability
bank_snapshot.description: All probability problems: computing P(event) = favorable/total, complement rule P(A) = 1 - P(not A), union rule P(A∪B) = P(A)+P(B)-P(A∩B), conditional probability P(A|B) = P(A∩B)/P(B), independence P(

bank_snapshot.name: Trapezoid Area with Diagonals
bank_snapshot.description: Solve for the area of a trapezoid given areas of triangles formed by intersecting diagonals.

bank_snapshot.name: Semicircles on a Line
bank_snapshot.description: Calculate the area of shaded regions formed by semicircles with equidistant points on a line.

bank_snapshot.name: Triangle Altitude Ratios
bank_snapshot.description: Find the ratio between segments formed by altitudes and their intersection in triangles given side lengths and angle measures.

bank_snapshot.name: Composite Geometric Areas
bank_snapshot.description: Problems involving the calculation of areas formed by overlapping geometric figures such as squares, circles, and polygons.

bank_snapshot.name: Exponential Equation Solving
bank_snapshot.description: Solving for an unknown variable within equations involving exponential expressions by decomposition and representation change.

bank_snapshot.name: Pyramid Frustum Volume Ratios
bank_snapshot.description: Calculate the volume ratio of a frustum of a pyramid formed by truncating with a smaller similar pyramid.

bank_snapshot.name: Calculus and Analysis
bank_snapshot.description: Problems involving limits, derivatives, integrals, and series. Includes: evaluating limits (direct substitution, factoring, L'Hopital's rule, squeeze theorem); derivatives and differentiation rules (p

bank_snapshot.name: Quadratic Equation Rational Roots
bank_snapshot.description: Determine conditions when a quadratic equation has rational solutions based on its coefficients.

bank_snapshot.name: Nested Arithmetic Operations
bank_snapshot.description: Evaluate expressions characterized by repeated nested arithmetic operations with a common pattern.
